chapter_title.en: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)

text: 5837 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "إِنِّي لَأَرْحَمُ ثَلاَثَةً وَ حَقٌّ لَهُمْ أَنْ يُرْحَمُوا عَزِيزٌ أَصَابَتْهُ مَذَلَّةٌ بَعْدَ اَلْعِزِّ وَ غَنِيٌّ أَصَابَتْهُ حَاجَةٌ بَعْدَ اَلْغِنَى وَ عَالِمٌ يَسْتَخِفُّ بِهِ أَهْلُهُ وَ اَلْجَهَلَةُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5837 - Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as), said:
"Indeed, I feel mercy for three people, and it is their right to be shown mercy:
A noble person who has been humiliated after his honor,
A wealthy person who has fallen into poverty after wealth,
And a scholar who is belittled by his own people and the ignorant."
